name: manulai-local-agent
description: ManulAI is a local AI coding assistant for Visual Studio Code powered entirely by your own Ollama runtime.

chatParticipants.name: manulai
chatParticipants.description: Chat with ManulAI local Ollama assistant (@manulai)

commands.name: model
commands.description: Show the active Ollama model, agent mode and auto-approve status

commands.name: setAgentMode
commands.description: Set agent mode: chat, agent, or planner

commands.name: instructions
commands.description: Show loaded workspace agent instructions (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, etc.)

manulai.ollamaModel.description: Local Ollama model used for chat and tool calling.

manulai.ollamaBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the local Ollama server.

manulai.debugMode.description: When enabled, ManulAI saves detailed JSONL logs to .manulai/logs/ for file-backed workspaces, or to extension storage when the workspace is not file-backed. Logs include Ollama requests, tool calls, fallback decisions, and blocked writes.

manulai.systemPrompt.default: You are ManulAI, a privacy local coding assistant running inside VS Code. Work across any programming language. Prefer precise, minimal changes and explain results clearly.
manulai.systemPrompt.description: System prompt prepended to every Ollama chat request.
